title: Immersive Interfaces - Mod Support Unofficial
description: Shrimp's Immersive Interfaces Add-on: This Texture Pack adds small details to some mods to fit more with Immersive Interfaces.
body: Shrimp's Immersive Interfaces Add-on: This Texture Pack adds small details to some mods to fit more with Immersive Interfaces. **Mod Compatibility:** - [Accesories](https://modrinth.com/mod/accessories) ([Curios](https://modrinth.com/mod/accessories-cc-layer) & [Trinkets](https://modrinth.com/mod/accessories-tc-layer)) - [Accessories Compatibility Layer](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/backpacked) - [Alex's Caves](https://modrinth.com/mod/alexs-caves) - [Alex's Mobs](https://modrinth.com/mod/alexs-mobs) - [Armageddon](https://modrinth.com/mod/armageddon) - [Apotheosis](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/apotheosis) & [(Fabric)](https://modrinth.com/mod/zenith) - [Apothic Attributes](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/apothic-attributes) & [(Fabric)](https://modrinth.com/mod/zenith-attributes) - [Apothic Enchanting](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/apothic-enchanting) - [Backpacked](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/backpacked) - [Cosmetic Armor Reworked](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cosmetic-armor-reworked) - [Curios API](https://modrinth.com/mod/curios) - [Diet](https://modrinth.com/mod/diet) - [Easy Magic](https://modrinth.com/mod/easy-magic) - [Ender Chested](https://modrinth.com/mod/ender-chested/) - [EMI](https://modrinth.com/mod/emi) - [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight) & ([Refabricated] - [Fishing Upgrades & More](https://modrinth.com/mod/fishing-upgrade) - [Inventory Profiles Next](https://modrinth.com/mod/inventory-profiles-next) - [Horseman](https://modrinth.com/mod/horseman) - [Iron Chests](https://modrinth.com/mod/iron-chests) - [Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks](https://modrinth.com/mod/irons-spells-n-spellbooks) - [ItemSwampper](https://modrinth.com/plugin/itemswapper) - [Just Enough Items (JEI)](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) - [Just Enough Resources](https://modrinth.com/mod/just-enough-resources-jer) - [Just Leveling](https://modrinth.com/mod/just-leveling) & [Fork](https://modrinth.com/mod/justleveling-fork) - [L_Ender 's Cataclysm](https://modrinth.com/mod/l_enders-cataclysm) - [Legendary Tabs](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/legendary-tabs) - [Let's Do Camping](https://modrinth.com/mod/lets-do-camping) - [Miner's Delight+](https://modrinth.com/mod/miners-delight) - [Molten Metal](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/molten-metal) - [Polymorph](https://modrinth.com/mod/polymorph) - [Roughly Enough Items (REI)](https://modrinth.com/mod/rei) - [Sophisticated Backpacks](https://modrinth.com/mod/sophisticated-backpacks) - [Sophisticated Storage](https://modrinth.com/mod/sophisticated-storage) - [Spell Engine (RPG Classes API)](https://modrinth.com/mod/spell-engine) - [What Are They Up To (Watut)](https://modrinth.com/mod/what-are-they-up-to) - [Quark](https://modrinth.com/mod/quark) - [Quark Oddities](https://modrinth.com/mod/quark-oddities) - [T.O Magic 'n Extras (Iron's Spells Addon)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/to-tweaks-irons-spells) - [Terramity](https://modrinth.com/mod/terramity) - [Traveler's Backpack](https://modrinth.com/mod/travelersbackpack) - [TrashSlot](https://modrinth.com/mod/trashslot) - [Trinkets](https://modrinth.com/mod/trinkets) - [Yukami's Sophisticated Backpack Tab](https://modrinth.com/mod/yukamis-sophisticated-backpack-tab) - [yyz's backpack](https://modrinth.com/mod/yyzs-backpack) ## Other compatibilities in parts: ### **Just Enough Items (JEI) Support:** Before: ![s](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/56eed0d9616022d8ba11280f24d796f94c7011ad.png) After: ![f](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/78b1337f9f1c379c8c5e95f8412badaf4e48eefa.png) ### **Quark Oddities Support:** Before: ![v](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9717a213056415fa137af8ce4dcbc918277c456c.png) After: ![g](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4893ca525d0f5038c4dac9a7f4d34e31c2521d57.png) ### **Curios Support:** Before: ![a](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6e4971f20e3868c8316b768064001917183e19bf.png) After: ![b](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/47831a91ff2f14328008a208faa0e79afccf796c.png) ### **Sophisticated Backpacks & Storage Support:** Before: ![d](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/93394d4e61fad6b2825c4382b8591c98e02e9d3b.png) After: ![ff](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b667412bf2bcb55359f06632f7c3cc7984ccb6a4.png) ### **Traveler's Backpack:** Before: ![f](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5772e6ef5345fbc8fc0e651ef7553a7474416aec.png) After: ![a](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/53192abe2b42f6d7ddd4cb006126b2aa672c960a.png) ### **Trinkets & Diet Support:** Before: ![c](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0c782aed2bca1c718d2da96715169e9355718915.png) After: ![d](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/270fc9ce64057c8bd8621cef76a59c14cc8ac9a3.png) ### **Enchanting Table (Easy Magic):** Before: ![e](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f888c0ac35b892d7088bd5cf8918ee2445e4279d.png) After: ![g](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b167df83be0912c84f69d656a190f022420fa1b5.png) ### **Spell Binding Table (Spell Engine - Rpg Classes API):** Before: ![e](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6023a26af1bab7945d189ebd8cffa5ea76245702.png) After: ![f](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a8474fac760eeba4bf83765949f8851080d2bb8f.png) ### **Cosmetic Armor Reworked:** Before: ![sadrfawsf](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2a185169474cf211b223bd8c41f724a407f9f1b1.png) After: ![assfaaff](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ff2b20d877825dae75af7c81ade5f34f76e2ad23.png) ### **Farmer's Delight:** Before: ![tgh](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fa3f71736d8845c4ebac55abec62336752fd1f84.png) After: ![bh](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bb95b4884bb2286d1f274630ef893345ba973108.png) ### **Accesories:** Before: ![v](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cc9077b67b95a5cbc52b650028f0434232417a25.png) After: ![cx](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fd00e4496741cb2ecf7ae10ce61018c67989715c.png) ### **Legendary Tabs:** Before: ![d](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cdf716be7f595ba695ded43cb249641525a89b9a.png) After: ![v](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/be7ba4016dc8838ce78ab620e592672c30becf0a.png) ### **TrashSlot:** Before: ![cvxc](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/83ba6997d1fae17fbe0a1e1b6845f39eedde2911.png) After: ![bcx](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2e51783d220f8e790b466b605c9b499a8ba48e87.png) ### **Fisherman (Fishing Upgrades & More):** Before: ![ui](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1ffe798cf533a329d4d938e8259e0dfeda4733a3.png) ![jkl](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6fe4d25ed5e4d67fb66ebab42df8dc61430fbd34.png) After: ![xdc](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1552d61a04de911a4226dbd83da55d7cc1252567.png) ![vc](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/573453dfeba2b5c5c4520127c64596ee9cc80e37.png) ### **What Are They Up To (Watut) Support:** ![f](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d7e6fa9a1e66358fcd3c9f027c902e47f354733b.png)
